context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the code-review instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Core principle:** Review early, review often. Self-review before PR. Re-review after significant changes.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Self-review the full branch diff using the Review Order below.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: generate-tasks must include a "Code review before merge" task.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use **only** these labels:

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **`Critical`** — security, data loss, crash, or **Always Critical** (see below). Block merge.
